summary: Salad Khatora - a sales and inventory management system for a food business with recipes, ingredients, invoicing, and automatic inventory deduction
architectural_notes: Invoice system with customer database and on-the-fly customer creation
Recipe-based inventory management with automatic ingredient deduction
Multi-item invoice support with search/filter interface for recipes
known_issues: Error on /sales route preventing access to new invoice page

existing_features.title: Fix the error on the /sales route that displays 'Something went wrong!' and prevents access to the invoice creation page
Implement customer management in the invoice form with a dropdown to select from pre-registered customers stored in the backend customer database
Add the ability to enter a new customer name directly in the invoice form when creating an invoice, even if the customer is not pre-registered
Display all available recipes in the invoice form with a search and filter interface to quickly find items
Show recipe prices alongside recipe names in the invoice item selection interface
Allow adding multiple recipe items with quantities to a single invoice
Capture comprehensive invoice details including customer information, items with quantities, pricing, invoice date, payment method, notes, and tax calculations
Automatically deduct ingredient quantities from inventory based on the recipes and quantities in the invoice when the invoice is saved
Calculate and display the invoice subtotal, discount, tax, and total amount in real-time as items are added

new_feature_requests.summary: Fix error on /sales route and create comprehensive invoice creation page
Customer management: select pre-registered customers or add new ones during invoice creation
Recipe selection interface with search/filter functionality showing prices
Comprehensive invoice details capture (customer info, items, quantities, pricing, date, payment method, notes, tax)
Automatic inventory deduction based on recipes when invoice is saved
